title: Better Leaves for Bare Bones x Fruit's Delight
description: Adds holes to fruit trees leaves from the Fruit's Delight mod in a Bare Bones style
body:
If you want the leaves of your Fruit's Delight trees to fit with [Barebones Better Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/barebones-better-leaves), this is the pack for you!

## Required
- [Fruit's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/fruits-delight)

## Strongly Recommended
- [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) texture pack
- [Bare Bones x Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-farmers-delight)
- [Barebones Better Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/barebones-better-leaves)
  - Does not contain cherry leaves, would recommend that texture from [Bare Bones - Better Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/barebones-better-leaves)

## Texture Changes
Leaves, flowers and fruit blocks for:
- Apple
- Bayberry
- Fig
- Hawberry
- Kiwi
- Lychee
- Mango
- Mangosteen
- Orange
- Peach
- Pear
- Persimmon
- Durian
